title: Improve BulkLoad restore status messages
description:
Enhance fdbrestore status output to be phase-aware for BulkLoad restores.

Current status shows misleading block-based progress for BulkLoad (which completes atomically). Should show:
- BulkLoad: 'loading' or 'complete' for snapshot phase
- Mutation log: 'pending', 'replaying', or 'complete'

Patch saved at: ~/filebackupagent_status_improvements.patch

File: fdbclient/FileBackupAgent.actor.cpp (getProgress_impl, getFullStatus_impl)

title: Refactor S3Client to add simple PUT optimization for small files
description:
Use simple PUT instead of multipart upload for small files in copyUpFile(). More efficient (1 request vs 3+) for files < multipart_min_part_size.

Requires refactor first: extract xxhash checksum calculation + storage pattern into a helper function. Currently duplicated in multipart path (XXH64_update/digest, format, writeChecksumWithFallback).

Implementation:
1. Create helper: calculateAndStoreChecksum(endpoint, bucket, object, data, hashState, config)
2. Multipart path calls helper after assembling all parts
3. Simple PUT path calls helper after reading file
4. Simple PUT uses writeEntireFile() for upload (handles S3 integrity hash internally)

File: fdbclient/S3Client.actor.cpp
